calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-01-2022 Vacated

Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted, Memorandum In Support; Declaration In Support
Off Calendar Mar-02-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC's unopposed Motion for Order That Matters in Request for Admission of Truth of Facts Be Admitted is GRANTED.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Peter Catalanotti; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2021 Set For Trial On Apr-04-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
